label: Gathering
description: Defines a social gathering event such as a party, marriage ceremony, or concert. Controls the worker class, pawn duty, random scheduling weight, spot definitions, UI messages, and optional royal-title requirements.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# GatheringWorker subclass that implements eligibility checks, spot selection, and scheduling for this gathering type.

duty.label: Duty
duty.description: DutyDef applied to attending pawns while the gathering is active.

randomSelectionWeight.label: Random selection weight
randomSelectionWeight.description: Weight used when auto-scheduling this gathering. A value of 0 means the gathering is never auto-selected (IsRandomSelectable returns false when this is 0).

respectTimetable.label: Respect timetable
respectTimetable.description: When true, pawns consult their joy timetable before joining. Set to false for mandatory gatherings such as marriage ceremonies.

gatherSpotDefs.label: Gather spot defs
gatherSpotDefs.description: ThingDefs that can serve as gathering spots (e.g. PartySpot). When empty, the worker selects any suitable cell.

letterTitle.label: Letter title
letterTitle.description: Title of the letter sent to the player when this gathering starts.

letterText.label: Letter text
letterText.description: Body text of the letter sent when this gathering starts. Supports the {ORGANIZER_labelShort} named argument.

calledOffMessage.label: Called off message
calledOffMessage.description: Message displayed when the gathering is cancelled before it completes.

finishedMessage.label: Finished message
finishedMessage.description: Message displayed when the gathering completes normally.

requiredTitleAny.label: Required title (any)
requiredTitleAny.description: The organizer must hold at least one of these royal titles for the gathering to be available. Used by Concert to require Knight, Praetor, Baron, or Count.

new-gathering.label: New gathering
new-gathering.description: Starter gathering with worker class, duty, and selection weight pre-filled. Matches the Party gathering structure.
